name: list_my_issues
description: List issues assigned to the current user. Use this to see what tasks you need to work on. For team-specific issues, use list_team_issues instead.

name: list_team_issues
description: List issues for a specific team. Use this to view all issues in a team's backlog or workflow. For your personal assigned issues, use list_my_issues instead.

team_id.description: Team ID (e.g., 'abc123'). Use list_teams to find team IDs.

name: get_issue
description: Get detailed information about a specific issue by its identifier. Use this to view issue description, status, assignee, priority, and other metadata. For searching issues by keyword, use search_issues instead.

name: search_issues
description: Search for issues by keyword. Use this to find issues matching specific terms in title or description. For getting details of a specific issue, use get_issue instead.

query.description: Search keyword or phrase (e.g., 'auth bug', 'login fail')

name: create_issue
description: Create a new issue in Linear. Use this to create new tasks, bugs, or feature requests. Required parameters are team ID and title. Optional parameters include description, priority, state, and assignee.

team_id.description: Team ID (required). Use list_teams to find team IDs.

title.description: Issue title (required). A brief summary of the issue.

description.description: Issue description with details, steps to reproduce, or context.

state_id.description: Initial state ID. Use list_states to find state IDs.

assignee_id.description: Assignee user ID. Use list_users to find user IDs.

name: update_issue
description: Update an existing issue. Use this to change issue status, title, assignee, priority, or description. For adding comments, use add_comment instead.

state_id.description: New state ID (e.g., to move to 'In Progress'). Use list_states to find state IDs.

assignee_id.description: New assignee user ID. Use list_users to find user IDs.

name: add_comment
description: Add a comment to an existing issue. Use this to add updates, notes, or mentions to an issue. For updating issue fields like status or assignee, use update_issue instead.

name: list_teams
description: List all teams in the workspace. Use this to find team IDs for creating issues or filtering by team. Each team has a key (like 'CLP', 'ENG') and name.

name: list_states
description: List workflow states for teams. Use this to find state IDs for updating issue status (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Done'). States include types like 'backlog', 'unstarted', 'started', 'completed', 'canceled'. Optionally filter by team ID.

team_id.description: Optional team ID to filter states for a specific team. If not provided, lists all workflow states.

name: list_users
description: List all users in the workspace. Use this to find user IDs for assigning issues or to see team members. Each user has a name, email, and ID.
